seoTitle: Loorana vs Lottah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Loorana and Lottah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Loorana and Lottah.
heading: Loorana vs Lottah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Loorana, Tasmania and Lottah, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lottah has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Loorana (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Loorana or Lottah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Loorana has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Lottah scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Loorana scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Lottah scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Loorana or Lottah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lottah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
